title: Hallmark
description: Generate web UI that refuses to look AI-generated. Drives the Nutlope/hallmark design skill — a tight anti-slop rule set (21 macrostructures, a 20-theme catalog, OKLCH tokens, a 58-gate slop test) — across four verbs: build a page, audit one, redesign one, or study a reference into a portable design.md.

cta.label: Fork and run
cta.note: Runs on Jetty's managed sandbox. No setup. Free for your first 10 runs.

example_outputs.title: Atmospheric AI app landing (build)
example_outputs.summary: A nocturnal landing page for a 2am voice-notes app — Midnight theme, a four-stage Narrative Workflow macrostructure, real CSS-art. 58/58 slop gates.

values.brief: A landing page for Cricket — a late-night AI voice companion that captures, transcribes, and threads the half-formed ideas you have at 2am into something you can act on by morning. Audience: writers, founders, and makers who think after dark. The one action: start a free nightly capture. Feel: calm, atmospheric, nocturnal — not another loud SaaS hero.

outputs.description: Full-page render of the built page (the gallery hero).
The standalone page — links styles.css + tokens.css by relative href.
Component styles; references tokens by name, Hallmark stamp on line 1.
OKLCH token system (palette, type scale, spacing, motion).
Run summary (inferred design context / findings / DNA).

example_outputs.title: Editorial city quarterly (build)
example_outputs.summary: A warm, text-forward subscriber page for an independent print magazine — Almanac theme, Letter macrostructure. Structurally the opposite of Cricket from the same runbook.

values.brief: A single-page site for Marginalia — an independent print quarterly about the future of cities: housing, transit, public space, and the people who shape them. Audience: urbanists, architects, and curious city-dwellers. The one action: subscribe to the next issue. Feel: editorial, warm, literary, print-rooted — long-form and text-forward, not a tech product.

outputs.description: Full-page render of the built page (the gallery hero).
The standalone page — links styles.css + tokens.css by relative href.
Component styles; references tokens by name, Hallmark stamp on line 1.
OKLCH token system (palette, type scale, spacing, motion).
Run summary (inferred design context / findings / DNA).

example_outputs.title: Audit a textbook AI-slop page (audit)
example_outputs.summary: Scores a deliberately AI-generated SaaS page against the 58-gate canon: 7 critical · 9 major · 4 minor, each with a file:line citation. No edits.

input.license: Synthetic sample (authored for this example; freely redistributable)

values.brief: Audit this landing page against Hallmark's anti-pattern list. It is a typical AI-generated SaaS landing page. Return a ranked punch list grouped by severity with a count line. Do NOT edit anything.

outputs.description: Ranked anti-pattern punch list grouped by severity, with file:line citations.
Run summary (inferred design context / findings / DNA).

example_outputs.title: Study GOV.UK → a portable design.md (study)
example_outputs.summary: URL-mode DNA extraction of the OGL-licensed GOV.UK Design System into a portable design.md — tokens, type roles, archetypes. Structure only, never pixels.

input.license: OGL v3.0 (public reference — DNA extraction only, no pixels/copy)

values.brief: Extract the design DNA of GOV.UK as a public design reference (the OGL-licensed GOV.UK Design System) — its macrostructure, type-pairing roles, colour anchor, and component archetypes — and lock it into a portable design.md. Structure only, never pixels or copy.

outputs.description: Portable design DNA — tokens, type roles, archetypes, motion stance, provenance.
The one-page 'what you're looking at' diagnosis report.
Run summary (inferred design context / findings / DNA).

inputs.label: Operation
inputs.description: build a new page · audit an existing one · redesign one · study a reference into a design.md.

inputs.label: Brief / instructions
inputs.description: What to design or rebuild — audience, purpose, content, any brand colour/vibe. Required for build/redesign.

inputs.label: Study target URL
inputs.description: study URL-mode: a public page whose DNA to extract. Omit for image-mode (screenshot upload).

inputs.label: Tone
inputs.description: One extreme. `auto` infers from the brief.

inputs.label: Genre
inputs.description: Scopes themes + slop gates. `auto` picks by signal.

inputs.label: Theme
inputs.description: A catalog theme slug (Specimen, Terminal, Bloom, …) or `custom`. `auto` rotates by genre.

inputs.label: Uploaded inputs
inputs.description: audit/redesign: the page(s) to read. study image-mode: a screenshot.

metrics._note: Live counters — supplied by the Jetty backend at render time, not authored here.

handoff.name: hallmark
handoff.eval_runs: 4/4 production runs green (e7dbdc23 build, cdbcaba1 build, a45a609c audit, 4e4867f2 study); all operation-clean, no scratch pollution; two builds at 58/58 slop gates.

caveats: Build/redesign need the prism-playwright snapshot for the in-sandbox screenshot.png hero; on a non-browser snapshot the page still builds but the render degrades to PARTIAL.
Web fonts (Fontshare/Google) load at render time over the network; offline sandboxes fall back to system stacks in each theme's font-stack.
study URL-mode can't judge visual rhythm from HTML alone and says so; JS-only SPA shells / auth walls fall back to a screenshot request.
The non-interactive override disables Hallmark's design-context question; the agent infers audience/use/tone and states the inferences in summary.md.
